name: Markup Layer
description: HTML entry point defining the page structure with 5 interactive sections, controls, and semantic layout for the YouTube introduction website.

name: Application Logic
description: Core JavaScript handling all interactive features including pixel animations, 3D skin gallery, guestbook with localStorage, dark mode, music control, and UI state management.

name: Styling Layer
description: Complete CSS stylesheet implementing pixel art aesthetic with animations, responsive layouts, 3D transforms, dark mode theming, and visual effects.

name: Documentation
description: Project specification and planning documents detailing design concept, features, technology stack, and development roadmap for the BLACK_KNIGHT website.

name: Tooling Configuration
description: Tool-specific configuration files for the development and analysis infrastructure.
